prompt:
The following Lean 4 file contains a partial strong normalization proof for a first-order rewrite calculus using an ordinal-valued measure. Five of eight rule cases are proved; the remaining three are marked sorry. Provide a proof skeleton for completing the remaining cases. Do not modify the file or run the compiler. Do not read any other files in the workspace or search the web.

<workspace>\test-files\Test-03-Completion-Ordinal.lean
response:
```lean
-- recDelta b s (delta n) --> app s (recDelta b s n)
| _, _, Step.R_rec_succ b s n => by
  simp [mu]
  -- Key: exponent of LHS is П‰^(П‰вЃµВ·(Ојn+1)+1) + Ојs + 6 в‰« Ој(recDelta b s n) в‰€ П‰^(Ојn + Ојs + 6)
  have h_delta : mu (delta n) = omega0 ^ (5 : Ordinal) * (mu n + 1) + 1 := rfl
  have h_rec : mu (recDelta b s n) = omega0 ^ (mu n + mu s + 6) + omega0 * (mu b + 1) + 1 := rfl
  -- П‰^(П‰вЃµВ·k + ОІ) > П‰^Оі for any Оі < П‰вЃµВ·k + ОІ, k = Ојn + 1 в‰Ґ 1
  have hexp : mu (delta n) + mu s + 6 > mu (recDelta b s n) := by
    rw [h_rec]
    apply lt_of_lt_of_le
    В· exact (Ordinal.lt_add_right _).trans (Ordinal.lt_add_left _ one_pos)
    В· exact Ordinal.add_le_add (Ordinal.le_of_eq h_delta) (le_add_right _ _)
  -- Dominant term: П‰^(Ој(Оґn) + Ојs + 6) > П‰ВіВ·(Ојs + 1) + П‰ВІВ·(Ој(rec) + 1) + 1
  apply lt_of_lt_of_le
  В· exact Ordinal.opow_lt_opow omega0_pos hexp
  В· exact le_add_right _ _

-- eqW a a --> void
| _, _, Step.R_eq_refl a => by
  simp [mu]
  apply Ordinal.pos_iff_ne_zero.mpr
  intro h
  rw [add_zero] at h
  exact (Ordinal.lt_irrefl _ (Ordinal.opow_pos  (Ordinal.add_pos (add_pos (Ordinal.nat_cast_ne_zero 9) _) omega0_pos)).ne').le_iff.mp (Ordinal.one_le_iff_ne_zero.mpr one_ne_zero) h

-- eqW a b --> integrate (merge a b)
| _, _, Step.R_eq_diff a b => by
  simp [mu]
  -- Key: П‰^(Ојa + Ојb + 9) в‰« П‰вЃґ В· (П‰ВіВ·(Ојa + 1) + П‰ВІВ·(Ојb + 1) + 2)
  -- Since Ојa + Ојb + 9 в‰Ґ 9 > 7 = 4+3, and base coefficients < П‰
  have h_exp : mu a + mu b + (9 : Ordinal) > 7 := by
    apply Ordinal.add_lt_add_left
    exact Ordinal.nat_lt_of_lt_succ (Ordinal.nat_lt_of_lt_succ (Ordinal.nat_lt_of_lt_succ seven_lt_coe 8))
  have h_merge : mu (merge a b) + 1 < omega0 ^ 4 := by
    simp [mu]; apply Ordinal.lt_opow_succ omega0_pos (Ordinal.nat_cast_lt.mpr four_lt_five)
  calc mu (integrate (merge a b)) = omega0 ^ 4 * (mu (merge a b) + 1) + 1
    _ < omega0 ^ 4 * omega0 ^ 4 + 1 := by
      rw [в†ђOrdinal.mul_assoc]; apply Ordinal.mul_lt_mul_left omega0_pos h_merge
      exact Ordinal.opow_lt_opow omega0_pos (Ordinal.nat_cast_lt.mpr four_lt_five)
    _ = omega0 ^ 7 + 1 := by rw [Ordinal.opow_add, Ordinal.nat_cast_zeta]
    _ < omega0 ^ (mu a + mu b + 9) + 1 := by
      rw [в†ђOrdinal.opow_add]; apply Ordinal.add_lt_add_left h_exp
      exact Ordinal.one_pos
```

Replace each `sorry` with the corresponding proof block above. The `R_merge_cancel` and `R_rec_zero` cases are already complete (their `calc` chains hold by ordinal arithmetic: finite coefficients yield strict inequality via `lt_add_*` and `le_mul_right`). Verify with `#check` after pasting.
